title: Festival and Wedding Season
scenario: It is festival and wedding season, and the invitations are piling up. Between gifts, new outfits and travel, you could easily spend ₹30,000 this month. Family expects generous gifting, but that figure would wipe out your savings for the month and then some.

choices.label: Set a ₹12,000 festival budget and choose thoughtful, modest gifts
choices.lesson: A pre-set celebration budget lets you join in joyfully without regret. Thoughtfulness, not spend, is what people actually remember.

choices.label: Spend freely to match everyone else's gifting and outfits
choices.lesson: Social pressure can blow a hole in a single month's finances. Celebrations should fit your budget, not someone else's expectations.
